summary: A Fox News broadcast segment (FOX NEWS ALERT lower-thirds, gas-price and crude-oil graphics) showing Energy Secretary Chris Wright in a remote interview about gas prices amid the Iran conflict. It is a captured cable-news interview, not produced or music-driven youth-appeal content.
